summary: Manual spec review approved GH-168 packaged Electron startup repair at head 0f8609927ff0c5cc5f9107de06fd551b0a546050. The spec is scoped to file:// renderer assets, packaged preload injection, and packaged renderer smoke. Post-review drift in this commit is limited to GH-168 progress/review carriers.
reviewed_validation_summary: PR #172 head 0f8609927ff0c5cc5f9107de06fd551b0a546050 passed local `npm run smoke:packaged`, `npm run smoke`, `npm audit --audit-level=high`, `git diff --check`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-168 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-168 --json`. Hosted run 28652249588 passed py-compile, demo-bootstrap, repo-local-cli, and loom-check; loom-pr-merge-gate failed because review artifacts were stale for the current PR head before this update.
follow_ups: Continue #169 only after GH-168 merge/closeout or scheduler confirmation.
Fix Loom suite CLI JSON consumption outside this App product PR; no repo-local shim was added.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The GH-168 formal spec and plan match the PR scope: packaged asset path repair, preload injection repair, and smoke evidence. The spec explicitly excludes UI redesign, Task Thread migration, Stage 5, and live Core/Harbor/Lode.

consumed_inputs.suite_validation: loom suite validate --target . --item GH-168 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-168 --json
consumed_inputs.scope_boundary: No UI redesign, Task Thread migration, Stage 5, or live Core/Harbor/Lode.
